CommunityApplications.Profile:
# Vellichor
Self-hosted apps by **woodscode**.
**Vellichor** turns your written stories and ebooks into narrated audiobooks using the [Kokoro-82M](https://huggingface.co/hexgrad/Kokoro-82M) TTS model. Features multi-voice character casting (rule-based or AI Smart cast via Ollama), background ambience mixing, chaptered **M4B** + per-chapter **MP3** output, and auto-export to an Audiobookshelf library. Optional NVIDIA GPU acceleration; falls back to CPU.
For setup, configuration, and support, see the [project README](https://github.com/woodscode/vellichor-web) and [open an issue](https://github.com/woodscode/vellichor-web/issues).
